calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Brome, Esq., 510.337.1001, for Petitoners The Board of Trustees, Carpenters Vacation-Holiday Trust Fund for California, Carpenters Pension Trust Fund for Northern California, Carpenters Annuity Trust Fund for Northern California, Carpenters Training Trust Fund for Northern California and Northern California Carpenters Reginal Council; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitoners The Board of Trustees, Carpenters Vacation-Holiday Trust Fund for California, Carpenters Pension Trust Fund for Northern California, Carpenters Annuity Trust Fund for Northern California, Carpenters Training Trust Fund for Northern California and Northern California Carpenters Reginal Council'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. The Court will award $700.00 in reasonable attorney fees and $834.54 in costs. Order signed in open court. Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
